name: poc-test-coverage
description: 231 passing tests across 8 PoC files validate all library choices and patterns. Coverage: ucast-poc (30), validation-poc (23), memory-backend-poc (50), sql-backend-poc (39), sql-boundaries (18), backend-registry-poc (22), collection-mixin-poc (29), separate-mixin-poc (20).
recommendation: PoC tests serve as integration test reference. Implementation tests should cover same scenarios with production code.
